skills.name: api-docs
skills.desc: Generate OpenAPI docs from route definitions and keep them in sync with code. Use after changing endpoints.

skills.name: changelog
skills.desc: Generate a user-facing changelog from commits between two tags. Use before cutting a release.

skills.name: code-review
skills.desc: Review the working diff for correctness bugs and simplification wins, ranked by severity. Use before committing or opening a PR.

skills.name: commit-helper
skills.desc: Read staged changes and draft a commit message matching the repo's history style. Use before git commit.

skills.name: dataviz
skills.desc: Read before charting: color formula, form heuristics, light/dark validator. Use for any chart or dashboard task.

skills.name: meeting-notes
skills.desc: Turn meeting transcripts into decisions plus an action list. Use when a transcript is pasted.

skills.name: pdf-extract
skills.desc: Extract text and tables from PDFs, with OCR for scanned files. Use when a .pdf file is mentioned.

skills.name: regex-helper
skills.desc: Explain gnarly regexes and offer tested alternatives. Use when a regex is hard to read.

skills.name: security-audit
skills.desc: Review changes for injection, authz gaps, and leaked secrets. Use for auth or untrusted-input changes.

skills.name: slide-deck
skills.desc: Turn an outline into a .pptx deck using templates and layouts. Use when a deck or slides are requested.

skills.name: sql-optimizer
skills.desc: Analyze slow-query plans and suggest indexes or rewrites. Use when a query is reported slow.

skills.name: test-writer
skills.desc: Write unit tests for changed functions, auto-detecting the framework and existing style. Use after writing new logic.

bodies.api-docs:
---
name: api-docs
description: Generate OpenAPI docs from route definitions and keep them in sync with code. Use after changing endpoints.
---

# api-docs

## 何时用 / When to use

- 从路由定义生成 OpenAPI 文档并保持与代码同步。新增/修改接口后使用。
- Generate OpenAPI docs from route definitions and keep them in sync with code. Use after changing endpoints.

## 步骤 / Steps

# changelog

## 何时用 / When to use

bodies.code-review:

name: code-review
description: Review the working diff for correctness bugs and simplification wins, ranked by severity. Use before committing or opening a PR.
---

# code-review

## 何时用 / When to use

- 审查改动中的正确性缺陷与可简化处,按严重度排序输出。提交前、开 PR 前使用。
- Review the working diff for correctness bugs and simplification wins, ranked by severity. Use before committing or opening a PR.

## 步骤 / Steps

1. …
2. …

# commit-helper

## 何时用 / When to use

- 读暂存区改动,生成符合仓库历史风格的提交信息。git commit 前使用。
- Read staged changes and draft a commit message matching the repo's history style. Use before git commit.

## 步骤 / Steps

1. …
2. …

# dataviz

## 何时用 / When to use

- 画图表前先读:配色公式、图形选择启发式、明暗双主题校验器。任何图表/仪表盘任务使用。
- Read before charting: color formula, form heuristics, light/dark validator. Use for any chart or dashboard task.

## 步骤 / Steps

2. …

## 何时用 / When to use

- 解释复杂正则并生成带测试样例的替代写法。遇到看不懂的正则时使用。
- Explain gnarly regexes and offer tested alternatives. Use when a regex is hard to read.

# security-audit

## 何时用 / When to use

- 审查改动中的注入、越权、密钥泄露风险。涉及认证或外部输入的改动使用。
- Review changes for injection, authz gaps, and leaked secrets. Use for auth or untrusted-input changes.

- Write unit tests for changed functions, auto-detecting the framework and existing style. Use after writing new logic.
